problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 12,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
